recommendations.title: A Perfect Man
recommendations.overview: A struggling writer finds a shortcut to fame, but a blackmailer threatens to ruin his perfect life.

recommendations.title: Guru
recommendations.overview: Matt, a charismatic coach, captivates crowds until he spirals into a disturbing downward spiral.

recommendations.title: Burn Out
recommendations.overview: Tony, a promising young motorcycle racer, is forced to do perilous drug runs to save the mother of his child from a dangerous mobster.

recommendations.title: Black Box
recommendations.overview: Mathieu is a young and talented black box analyst on a mission to solve the reason behind the deadly crash of a brand new aircraft. Yet, when the case is closed by authorities, Mathieu cannot help but sense there is something wrong with the evidence.

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: Visions
recommendations.overview: An experienced airline pilot, Estelle leads a perfect life between long-haul flights with her loving, protective husband Guillaume. One day, by chance, in an airport corridor, she crosses paths with Ana, a photographer with whom she had a passionate

recommendations.title: Whisper
recommendations.overview: Sinister things begin happening to kidnappers who are holding a young boy for ransom in a remote cabin.

recommendations.title: Shut In
recommendations.overview: A young single mother is held captive along with her two children by a violent ex and must plot their escape before it’s too late.

recommendations.title: The Painted Bird
recommendations.overview: After losing his parents, a young Jewish boy wanders Eastern Europe, seeking refuge during World War II.

recommendations.title: 3096 Days
recommendations.overview: A young Austrian girl is kidnapped and held in captivity for eight years. Based on the real-life case of Natascha Kampusch.
